positive: A stylized and minimalist depiction of a whimsical forest scene. Focus on clean, bold silhouettes of oak trees, glowing mushrooms, and wandering woodland creatures like deer and foxes. The composition should feature a central, meandering path leading into the depth of the woods. Use a rich, gradient color palette of deep indigo, emerald green, and warm gold, accented by vibrant pops of bioluminescent light. The style should be a blend of Art Nouveau and detailed modern vector art, optimized for high-contrast apparel printing. The overall mood is magical, serene, and enchanting.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, poor anatomy, low detail, grainy, noisy, bad perspective, muted colors, photorealism
